info.title: ThrowsAnalyzer CLI - Exception Analysis Tool
info.description: Command-line tool for running ThrowsAnalyzer on projects and solutions, generating comprehensive HTML and Markdown reports with exception handling diagnostics, statistics, and code snippets.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: ThrowsAnalyzer CLI - Analyze projects for exception handling diagnostics

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Analyze a solution, project, or directory for ThrowsAnalyzer diagnostics

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to solution (.sln), project (.csproj), or directory to analyze
